message.content:
```json
{
    "redacted_chat_history": "Session Started.
Welcome to the Level Health Customer Service Support Tool. This system helps you find accurate answers from our documentation to assist customers during phone calls.

Responses will be provided in three clearly marked sections:

===APPROVED Q&A===

Answers from FAQs.pdf that can be directly relayed to customers

===PDF KNOWLEDGEBASE===

Additional information from other documents that you should review before responding

===THINKING===

Analysis and guidance  to help you understand the context and handle potential follow-up questions

To use the system:
1. Simply paste the customer's question directly into the input box
2. The system will search both our FAQ database and other documentation
3. Review all sections of the response:
   - Use the APPROVED Q&A section for direct customer responses
   - Review the PDF KNOWLEDGEBASE section for additional context
   - Use the THINKING section for guidance on handling the query
4. If no approved answer exists, you will be instructed to escalate to a specialist

All responses are verbatim from documentation and must be relayed exactly as provided to maintain compliance.

What could you do for me?

To properly assist you, I need to check our FAQ database for the most accurate and up-to-date information regarding Level Health's services and offerings. Let me do that for you now.

I forgot my password.

I understand you've forgotten your password. Let me check our FAQ database for the most appropriate answer to help you with this issue.

Thank you for your question about forgetting your password. I have an approved answer from our FAQ that can help you with this issue.

===APPROVED Q&A===
You can find your policy documents online. Please log in to your Customer Portal [here](https://levelhealth.ie/web-portals) and click on the 'My Documents' section to select the document that you wish to view. If you have not registered yet, you can do so if you click 'Forgot Password' on the login page.
Source: FAQs.pdf, page 5

===PDF KNOWLEDGEBASE===
No additional relevant information found in other documents.

===THINKING===
When responding to the customer about their forgotten password, you should focus on the relevant part of the FAQ answer. Here's how you might approach it:

1. Direct the customer to the Customer Portal login page at https://levelhealth.ie/web-portals.
2. Instruct them to click on the 'Forgot Password' option on the login page.
3. Explain that this will allow them to reset their password or register if they haven't done so already.

While the FAQ doesn't provide step-by-step instructions for the password reset process, it does point the customer in the right direction. If the customer asks for more detailed instructions about the password reset process after following these steps, you may need to escalate the query to get more specific information.

Also, note that the FAQ mentions accessing policy documents. While this isn't directly related to the password reset, you could mention this as an additional piece of information once they regain access to their account, as it might be useful for them to know.

Remember to use the information from the APPROVED Q&A section when directly quoting to the customer, as it's the officially approved response.",
    "redactions": {
        "Joulie Yen": "[PERSON]"
    }
}
```
